source_pr.title: plan: alloc plan ID in builder

root_cause_explanation: The tests were flaky due to a data race on the global plan ID counter (GlobalID) used during plan building. Concurrent plan building could mutate/read this shared state, causing nondeterministic IDs and -race failures. This PR stabilizes it by making ID allocation builder-local (planBuilder.allocID) instead of using a shared global counter.
fix_pattern: Avoid shared global counters in plan building; allocate plan IDs per builder (builder-local state) to prevent data races.

evidence: files: plan/new_plan_test.go, plan/newplanbuilder.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go
